description: European energy grid data for 2024 across 12 country/bidding zones. All timestamps are UTC. Generation and load are hourly averages (downsampled from 15-min source data). Physical flows are daily averages (downsampled from hourly).

tables.name: zones
tables.description: Lookup table of all country/bidding zone codes present in the database

tables.name: spot_prices
tables.description: Hourly day-ahead electricity spot prices per bidding zone in EUR/MWh. Covers AT, BE, CH, CZ, DE, DK1, FR, NL, PL for full year 2024. Negative prices occur during oversupply (e.g. high wind + low demand).

columns.name: price_eur_mwh
columns.description: Electricity price in EUR per MWh

tables.name: generation
tables.description: Hourly average electricity generation per bidding zone and source type, in MW. Covers AT, BE, CH, CZ, DE, DK1, FR, NL, PL for 2024. Downsampled from 15-minute source data.

columns.name: value_mw
columns.description: Average generation output in megawatts during this hour

tables.name: total_load
tables.description: Hourly average total electricity consumption per bidding zone in MW. Covers AT, BE, CH, CZ, DE, DK1, FR, NL, PL for 2024. Downsampled from 15-minute source data.

columns.name: value_mw
columns.description: Average electricity consumption in megawatts during this hour

tables.name: physical_flows
tables.description: Daily average cross-border physical electricity flows between bidding zones in MW. A positive value means power flowed from from_zone into to_zone on that day.

columns.name: value_mw
columns.description: Average power flow in megawatts for the day

tables.name: weather
tables.description: Hourly weather observations per zone from open-meteo, at a representative location for each country. Covers AT, BE, CH, CZ, DE, DK, FR, NL, PL for 2024.

columns.name: wind_speed_10m
columns.description: Wind speed at 10m height in km/h

columns.name: wind_speed_100m
columns.description: Wind speed at 100m height (turbine hub height) in km/h

useful_query_patterns: JOIN generation + weather ON (zone, ts) to correlate wind/solar output with wind speed or cloud cover
JOIN spot_prices + generation to see how generation mix affects price
JOIN spot_prices + total_load to see price vs demand relationship
GROUP BY source on generation to compare renewable vs fossil mix per country
Use DATE_TRUNC('month', ts) or DATE_TRUNC('day', ts) to aggregate to coarser time periods
